import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let parsed = string.parse_int(token)
    match parsed
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("positive=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
